additional_notes: The Clemson 2026 Pro Day is confirmed for March 12, 2026 (today), but as of the time of this search, official results have not yet been published. Clemson typically releases official results via clemsontigers.com and The Clemson Insider (theclemsoninsider.com) the day of or the day after the event. Per NFL.com's pro day schedule, the event is confirmed for March 12. Pro Football Network lists 11 Clemson prospects expected to participate. Expected participants based on pre-pro-day reporting include: QB Cade Klubnik, DT Peter Woods (did not participate in workouts at the Combine — expected to showcase athleticism at Pro Day), EDGE T.J. Parker (ran a 4.68 40-yard dash at the Combine), CB Avieon Terrell, WR Antonio Williams (ran a 4.41 40 at the Combine), OT Blake Miller (posted 9'5" broad jump and 32 bench press reps at the Combine), DT DeMonte Capehart (ran a 4.85 40 at the Combine), LB Wade Woodaz, OT Tristan Leigh, EDGE Will Heldt, CB Jeadyn Lukus, and RB Adam Randall. Note: One source (lastwordonsports.com) referenced Clemson's pro day as March 21st, but the NFL.com official schedule and multiple other sources confirm March 12. The Clemson Insider's homepage as of March 11, 2026 does not yet show a pro day results article. Please re-query after the event concludes (likely later today or tomorrow, March 13, 2026) to capture the full official results from the Clemson Football Strength & Conditioning staff, which are traditionally compiled as consensus results from on-site NFL scouting personnel.
